potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall create a unique Health ID based on mobile number or Aadhaar number.
The system shall store all health-related information of a person in the National Health ID repository.
The system shall allow patients to create their Health ID digitally.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The Prime Minister of India has announced a new scheme of National Health ID on August 15, 2020.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall announce a new scheme of National Health ID.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: This Health ID prevents various insurance frauds committed by several health agencies, hospitals including both doctors and patients.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall prevent various insurance frauds committed by health agencies, hospitals, doctors, and patients.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall create a unique Health ID based on mobile number or Aadhaar number.
hallucinations.reason: There is no mention of creating a Health ID in the source text. The source text only mentions that every Indian will get a unique Health ID.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall store all health-related information of a person in the National Health ID repository.
hallucinations.reason: While the source text mentions that the National Health ID will be a repository of all health-related information, it does not explicitly state that the system shall store this information.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow patients to create their Health ID digitally.
hallucinations.reason: The source text only mentions that every patient who wishes to have their health records available digitally must start by creating a Health ID, but it does not explicitly state that the system shall allow this.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall link each Health ID with a health data consent manager, such as the National Digital Health Mission (NDHM).
hallucinations.reason: While the source text mentions that each Health ID will be linked to a health data consent manager – such as the National Digital Health Mission (NDHM), it does not explicitly state that the system shall link them.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall seek patient's consent for the seamless flow of health information from the Personal Health Records module.
hallucinations.reason: While the source text mentions that the National Digital Health Mission (NDHM) will be used to seek the patient’s consent, it does not explicitly state that the system shall seek consent.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall create a unique Health ID based on mobile number or Aadhaar number.
duplicates.requirement_b: The system shall store all health-related information of a person in the National Health ID repository.
duplicates.reason: These two requirements are similar and may be considered duplicates.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: Children who are born after the implementation of the National Health ID will have all their medications recorded including the vaccines, etc.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is ambiguous as it does not clearly state what actions the system shall take.
